---

**PR title** must match: `type(scope): lowercase subject`  
Example: `fix(repo): fix release-please CI and changelog automation`

**Branch** must match: `type/scope-description`  
Example: `fix/repo-changelog-ci`

See [COMMIT_CONVENTIONS.md](../COMMIT_CONVENTIONS.md).
